name: cross-border-wealth
description: Legal engineering optimizer for cross-border wealth structuring, tax litigation research, and multi-jurisdiction entity architecture. Analyzes structures like LEGO — modular, repeatable, optimizable. Integrates Westlaw Classic MCP, produces HTML reports, and executes actions across Gmail, web search, and connected tools. Grounded to truth with self-verification at every step.

WESTLAW_CLIENT_ID.description: Westlaw institutional client ID (e.g., your university or firm ID)

WESTLAW_BASE_URL.description: Westlaw WAYFLESS URL for institutional SSO access

OECD_API_KEY.description: API key for OECD tax treaty database access

SEC_EDGAR_EMAIL.description: Email address for SEC EDGAR API rate limit identification

SINGAPORE_ELIT_API_KEY.description: API key for Singapore eLitigation access

TAIWAN_JUDICIAL_API_KEY.description: API key for Taiwan Judicial Yuan database access

EU_COMPLIANCE_API_KEY.description: API key for EU compliance database access

VAQUILL_API_KEY.description: API key for Vaquill AI semantic legal search (8M+ US opinions, USC, CFR)
